---
title: "Anna Lydia Keith Swinton"
---

## Anna Lydia Keith Swinton

**Dates:** (<i>c.</i> 1844-1875)

### Description

member of the Gosling Society

### Biography

A Gosling as ‘Heather’ 1866-1868?, her address was Miss A. Swinton, 4 Athol Crescent, Edinburgh or Swinton, by Coldstream.  She was probably Anna Lydia Keith Swinton (c.1844-1875) daughter of Archibald Adam Swinton (1821-1894) ICS, who married the Rev. Robert Home, minister of Swinton [LG 1965 Swinton of Swinton]

### Letters

- Letter from Nov 20th [1868]
- Letter from May 25 th [1867]

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
